title: Cartoon Cubes
description: Vivid and sharp textures in the classical resolution.
body:
Dive into the world of CartoonCubes! With strong colors and sharp edges, this pack offers you a unique view of the world. It's for those adventurers and builders who want to see something different and more experimental.

The textures in the Cartoon Cubes pack are made in a 16x resolution not only because it's the go-to resolution for many players, but also because it's a great resolution for expressing sharp, pixelated textures.

The pack has all of the textures you need, but there are plans not only to update the existing textures, but also to add support for some of the most popular mods. So, overall the future of this pack is looking bright.
